title: Paper PVP Training Bot
description: PPTB or Paper PVP Training Bot is a simple pvp bot using minecraft latest 1.21.11 mannequin
body:
PPTB or Paper PVP Training Bot is a simple pvp bot using minecraft latest 1.21.11 mannequin

It does not require any other plugin to work. its built to be 1.21.11 and above, It has superior bot, from easy to monster diffuculty.

Sword PVP is supported only, in the future mace pvp will be supported.

User are able to summon their own created bot using `/pvpmannequin summon` or create their own via `/pvpmannequin summon {name} {health -optional} {difficulty}` example: `/pvpmannequin summon whitz 200 easy`

Along with user being able to modify the bot inventory using `/pvpmannequin select {bot name} inventory} or saving them
